title: Benalmadena Dolphin Watching Boat Rental: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Benalmadena offers excellent dolphin watching boat rental opportunities, with trips departing from Puerto Marina typically costing between 35 and 120 EUR per person. BoatHire24 connects you with skippers and private charters for an unforgettable experience on the Mediterranean Sea.

Where to set off in Benalmadena

Depart from Puerto Marina Benalmadena, the main hub for boat rentals in the town. Also consider Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola to the west or Cabopino Marina to the east for alternate departure points. Boats often head towards the Bay of Malaga or the waters off Torremolinos for the best dolphin sightings. The nearby island of Isla de Alborán is further out but hosts large pods of common dolphins.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Benalmadena?

Prices vary by boat type and duration, from 35 EUR for shared tours to 650 EUR for private day charters. A two-hour shared dolphin tour typically costs 35-60 EUR per person. For a more exclusive experience, private motorboat rentals start around 250 EUR for a half-day. Catamaran full-day charters for up to 12 guests range from 400 to 800 EUR. You can compare prices and book a charter online through BoatHire24.

  • Shared tour (2 hrs): from 35 EUR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hrs): from 250 EUR
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hrs): from 400 EUR
  • Private crewed yacht (full day): from 650 EUR

Which boat to rent for dolphin watching

Choose a boat that matches your group size and desired comfort level.

  1. Rigid inflatable boat (RIB), best for speed and getting close to dolphins; ideal for 6-8 guests; from 35 EUR shared.
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Azimut or Fairline), perfect for comfort and style; suitable for 8-12 guests; from 250 EUR half-day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon), offers stability and space; great for families; up to 12 guests; from 400 EUR full-day.
  4. Sailing yacht, for a quieter, eco-friendly trip; accommodates 6-8 guests; from 300 EUR half-day. This motor yacht is a popular choice for dolphin watching in Benalmadena.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Benalmadena?

In Spain, boats under 6 metres with an engine of up to 11.03 kW (15 hp) do not require a licence, but most charter boats come with a skipper. For private rentals without a skipper, you may need a Spanish recreational boating licence or an equivalent International Certificate of Competence. The operator confirms exact requirements at the time of booking. For crewed charters, the skipper holds all necessary qualifications, so you can relax.

A local tip: book a morning departure in summer for calmer seas and increased dolphin activity before the wind picks up.

When is the best season for dolphin watching in Benalmadena?

The peak season runs from June to September, with the most reliable sightings and warmest weather. During these months, the Levante wind can kick up afternoon chop, so morning trips are often smoother. Spring and autumn also offer good conditions with fewer crowds. In 2026, plan your trip between May and October for the best balance of weather and dolphin presence.

At a glance

  • Price range: 35-650 EUR per person
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 to 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: 6-12 per private boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Benalmadena

Can I rent a boat without a skippers licence?

Most dolphin watching charter boats include a licensed skipper, so no licence is required from you.

How long does a dolphin watching trip last?

Shared tours typically last 2 hours, while private charters can be booked for half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours).

What types of dolphins can I see near Benalmadena?

Common dolphins, striped dolphins and occasionally bottlenose dolphins are sighted in the waters off the Costa del Sol.

Is it guaranteed to see dolphins?

No guarantee is given, but operators report sighting rates above 80 per cent during peak season.

Whether you are a first-time visitor or a seasoned mariner, renting a boat in Benalmadena offers a memorable way to spot dolphins in their natural habitat. BoatHire24 provides a secure platform to compare options and browse the listings. Boat owners can also list their vessels and earn extra income by becoming a host on the site.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Benalmadena and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
